\tzpentry{ID3384}{Tunnel Quantum Magnetic Flux Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3384 introduces Tunnel Quantum Magnetic Flux Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \Phi_{tunnel} = \Phi_0 \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} e^{-S_{inst}^{(n)}/\hbar} $$
